# Documentation Update Checklist

Update all applicable docs after code and tests:
- README usage or setup changes
- API contracts or endpoint behavior changes
- Architecture or flow diagrams if behavior changed
- Migration notes if schema/data logic changed
- Operational runbook notes for support/on-call
- Changelog or release notes entry

Rules:
- Docs must reflect final implementation, not draft intent.
- Include known limitations and follow-up work.
